"As for those billions of tiny animals," he went on, "those infusoria that live by the millions in one droplet of water, 800,000 of which are needed to weigh one milligram, their role is no less important. They absorb the marine salts, they assimilate the solid elements in the water, and since they create coral and madrepores, they're the true builders of limestone continents! And so, after they've finished depriving our water drop of its mineral nutrients, the droplet gets lighter, rises to the surface, there absorbs more salts left behind through evaporation, gets heavier, sinks again, and brings those tiny animals new elements to absorb. The outcome: a double current, rising and falling, constant movement, constant life! More intense than on land, more abundant, more infinite, such life blooms in every part of this ocean, an element fatal to man, they say, but vital to myriads of animals--and to me!"

- [[lincoln-island]] — the island whose southern coast the river drains
Its forts and factories form the staging ground from which Lieutenant Hobson's expedition strikes north for the coast.

To Barbicane and Nicholl the plain is a study in lunar geography: "the 'Sea of Clouds' was an immense depression of ground, with circular mountains scattered about on it; covering a great part of the western side." (RM-011-017) Its edges are ill-charted — "This Sea of Clouds is rather doubtfully traced upon the maps." (RM-012-013)

The whole plot turns on a cipher that alone can clear Dacosta. Reasoning over it, Judge Jarriquez expects the document to contain "two or three words... 'arrayal,' 'diamond,' 'Tijuco,' 'Dacosta,' and others." (EHLA-034-012) The precious paper is thought to be the document written in the very hand of the true author of the crime of Tijuco. (EHLA-031-051)

California is the Pacific-coast American state whose capital is San Francisco, the scene of *Godfrey Morgan*. (GM-001-006) Its crowds are drawn from Americans of Utah, Oregon, and California, with a sixth part Frenchmen. (GM-001-004) Subject to the direct action of the polar currents, its first weeks of February resemble the last weeks of March in Central Europe. (GM-001-007)

Richmond stands as the prize Grant's army could not easily take. It is recorded that in "the coups de main by which General Grant attempted, though in vain, to possess himself of Richmond" (MI-002-004) the city held out, and only later "had doubtless soon fallen into the hands of General Grant" (MI-030-042).

Ten miles from the coastal forest, on the Coanza, a caravan of slaves lay encamped under the Arab Ibn Hamis. (DSCF-020-088) From this camp on the Coanza the convoy set out for Kazounde; eight days on, twenty had fallen by the way, prey to the beasts that prowled behind it. (DSCF-026-014) The camp was the point from which Dick Sand's forced march inland began. (DSCF-026-016)
tags: [place, lincoln-island, husbandry, the-mysterious-island, settlement]
The island is barren of timber. It was fortunate that its birds did not want branches to perch on, for there does not exist a tree in New Georgia. (AM-010-025)
pn_anchor: DOSE-015
GROW 2.1-B R264: 新建 finding-of-louis-cornbutte event，featured 档（WAI，WAI-012 Jean Cornbutte 北极搜寻队雪屋寻获生还之子 Louis）

- Simon Hart, the engineer held captive in the cavern and chronicler of these events, is the sole survivor—one body found intact upon the reefs, still breathing, a note-book clasped in his hand (FF-018-025).
- Master Zacharius, the aged Geneva clockmaker, whose every timepiece mysteriously stops and who, in the pride of science, refuses to believe his art can fail (MZ-002-003) (MZ-002-008).

Nicknamed "the Scarred Cheek" and clad in "the uniform of a Tartar officer" (MS-023-007), he condemns his captive with cold finality: "Ogareff approached Michael. 'You shall die!'" (MS-023-038). His cunning matches his cruelty — he deduces that "the pretended Nicholas Korpanoff was Michael Strogoff, courier of the Czar" (MS-015-095).
To the last the marvel remains beyond him — "the career of the comet was ever a mystery which neither Servadac nor his orderly could eliminate from the regions of doubt" (OC-045-024).
He reads their captor clearly, warning that Robur "will only give us our liberty when it suits him, and perhaps not at all" (RC-013-035).
He keeps his cover flawlessly: "None suspected that I was Simon Hart, the engineer, nor could they have suspected my nationality" (FF-005-006).
